evals.name: non-git-feature-brief
evals.prompt: The source snapshot at FIXTURE_ROOT is not a Git checkout. Grill the request to add CSV export, ground every current-state claim in the snapshot, compare materially different directions, and return the implementation brief in chat. Do not modify files.
evals.expected_output: Uses non-Git provenance, checks the premise and consumers, gives distinct directions and one recommendation, reports limitations, and writes no file.
